package rulecoverage

func NegativePatchDtoUsesNonPointerFieldsForOptionalUpdates() string {
    ruleID := "patch_dto_uses_non_pointer_fields_for_optional_updates"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "PATCH-like DTOs that cannot distinguish omitted fields from zero values."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
